      <span data-badge="wish" style="display:none;position:absolute;top:-3px;right:-4px;background:#e53935;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;min-width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;text-align:center;line-height:14px;padding:0 3px;box-sizing:border-box;"></span>
    </button>
    <button data-action="open-cart" aria-label="Bag" style="position:relative;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:4px;">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="22" height="22" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M6 2L3 6v14a2 2 0 002 2h14a2 2 0 002-2V6l-3-4z"/><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><path d="M16 10a4 4 0 01-8 0"/></svg>
      <span data-badge="cart" style="display:none;position:absolute;top:-3px;right:-4px;background:#e53935;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;min-width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:7px;text-align:center;line-height:14px;padding:0 3px;box-sizing:border-box;"></span>
    </button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- IMAGE GALLERY -->
<div class="gallery">
  <div class="gallery-slides" id="p_gallerySlides">
    <div class="gallery-slide" id="p_slide1"><img id="p_mainImg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AirFit Oversized Tee" data-black="data:image/png;base64," data-white="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/></div>
    <div class="gallery-slide" id="p_slide2"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AirFit Oversized Tee Model Front" data-black="data:image/png;base64," data-white="data:image/png;base64,"/></div>
    <div class="gallery-slide" id="p_slide3"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AirFit Oversized Tee Model Side" data-black="data:image/png;base64," data-white="data:image/png;base64,"/></div>
    <div class="gallery-slide" id="p_slide4"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="AirFit Lifestyle" data-black="data:image/png;base64," data-white="data:image/png;base64,"/></div>
  </div>
  <div class="gallery-dots" id="p_galleryDots">
    <div class="gallery-dot active"></div>
    <div class="gallery-dot"></div>
    <div class="gallery-dot"></div>
    <div class="gallery-dot"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PRODUCT INFO -->
<div class="product-info">
  <p class="product-series">AirFit™ Series · 280GSM</p>
  <h1 class="product-name">Oversized Tee</h1>
  <p class="product-subtitle">Heavyweight · Basic Plain · Structured Silhouette</p>

  <div class="price-row">
    <span class="price-main"><sup>RM</sup>99.90</span>
  </div>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- COLOUR -->
  <p class="selector-label">COLOUR — <em id="p_selectedColor">Black</em></p>
  <div class="colour-options">
    <button class="colour-btn black active" onclick="p_selectColor(this,'Black')" aria-label="Black"></button>
    <button class="colour-btn white" onclick="p_selectColor(this,'White')" aria-label="White"></button>
  </div>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- SIZE -->
  <div class="size-header">
    <p class="selector-label" style="margin:0">SIZE — <em id="p_selectedSize">SELECT</em></p>
    <span class="size-guide-link" onclick="p_openSizeGuide()">SIZE GUIDE</span>
  </div>
  <div class="size-options">
    <button class="size-btn">00</button>
    <button class="size-btn">0</button>
    <button class="size-btn">1</button>
    <button class="size-btn">2</button>
    <button class="size-btn">3</button>
    <button class="size-btn">4</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="cta-area">
  <button class="btn-add-bag" id="p_addBagBtn">Add to Bag</button>
  <button class="btn-wishlist" id="p_wishlistBtn">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.84 4.61a5.5 5.5 0 00-7.78 0L12 5.67l-1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 00-7.78 7.78l1.06 1.06L12 21.23l7.78-7.78 1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 000-7.78z"/></svg>
    <span>Save to Wishlist</span>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- PERKS -->
<div class="perks">
  <div class="perk">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
    Complimentary shipping on all orders
  </div>
  <div class="perk">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
    Free returns within 14 days
  </div>
  <div class="perk">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="1" y="3" width="15" height="13" rx="1"/><path d="M16 8h4l3 3v5h-7V8z"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/><circle cx="18.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/></svg>
    Estimated delivery: 2 – 4 working days
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ACCORDION -->
<div class="accordion">
  <div class="accordion-item" id="p_sizeChartItem">
    <button class="accordion-header" onclick="p_openSizeChart()">
      Size Chart
      <span style="font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--warm-grey);">VIEW ›</span>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="accordion-item">
    <button class="accordion-header" onclick="p_toggleAccordion(this)">
      Product Details
      <span class="accordion-icon"></span>
    </button>
    <div class="accordion-body">
      <ul>
        <li>280GSM heavyweight cotton blend</li>
        <li>Mock neck structured collar</li>
        <li>Dropped shoulders · boxy oversized fit</li>
        <li>Pre-shrunk · minimal shrinkage after wash</li>
        <li>Available in Black & White</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="accordion-item">
    <button class="accordion-header" onclick="p_toggleAccordion(this)">
      Material & Care
      <span class="accordion-icon"></span>
    </button>
    <div class="accordion-body">
      <ul>
        <li>100% Premium Cotton (280GSM)</li>
        <li>Machine wash cold, gentle cycle</li>
        <li>Do not bleach · tumble dry low</li>
        <li>Iron on low heat if needed</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="accordion-item">
    <button class="accordion-header" onclick="p_toggleAccordion(this)">
      Shipping & Returns
      <span class="accordion-icon"></span>
    </button>
    <div class="accordion-body">
      <p>Free shipping on all orders. Orders are processed within 1–2 business days. Returns accepted within 14 days of delivery — item must be unworn and in original condition.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="bottom-space"></div>



<!-- SIZE GUIDE MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="p_sizeModal" onclick="p_closeSizeGuide(event)">
  <div class="modal-sheet" style="position:relative;">
    <div class="modal-handle"></div>
    <span class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('p_sizeModal').classList.remove('open')">✕</span>
    <h2 class="modal-title">Size Guide</h2>
    <table class="size-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Size</th><th>Chest (cm)</th><th>Length (cm)</th><th>Shoulder (cm)</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>00</td><td>108</td><td>70</td><td>52</td></tr>
        <tr><td>0</td><td>114</td><td>73</td><td>55</td></tr>
        <tr><td>1</td><td>120</td><td>76</td><td>58</td></tr>
        <tr><td>2</td><td>126</td><td>79</td><td>61</td></tr>
        <tr><td>3</td><td>132</td><td>82</td><td>64</td></tr>
        <tr><td>4</td><td>138</td><td>99.90</td><td>67</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // Gallery swipe dots
  var slides = document.getElementById('p_gallerySlides');
  if (slides) {
    slides.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
      var idx = Math.round(slides.scrollLeft / slides.offsetWidth);
      document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .gallery-dot').forEach(function(d, i) {
        d.classList.toggle('active', i === idx);
      });
    });
  }
</script>


  </div>

  <script>
    function openProductPage() {
      document.getElementById('product-page').classList.add('active');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      document.getElementById('product-page').scrollTop = 0;
    }
    function closeProductPage() {
      document.getElementById('product-page').classList.remove('active');
      document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
  </script>

  

  <!-- SIZE CHART MODAL -->
  <div id="p_sizeChartModal" onclick="p_closeSizeChart(event)" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:99999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
    <div style="position:relative;background:var(--white);border-radius:12px;max-width:95vw;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 16px 28px;">
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('p_sizeChartModal').style.display='none'" style="position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--beige);border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;color:var(--warm-grey);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10;">✕</button>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NEATZ Size Chart" style="width:100%;height:auto;display:block;border-radius:4px;" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    function p_openSizeChart() {
      var m = document.getElementById('p_sizeChartModal');
      m.style.display = 'flex';
    }
    function p_closeSizeChart(e) {
      if (e.target === document.getElementById('p_sizeChartModal')) {
        document.getElementById('p_sizeChartModal').style.display = 'none';
      }
    }
  </script>

  

  <!-- CART PANEL -->
  <div id="cartPanel" style="position:fixed;top:0;right:0;width:92%;max-width:380px;height:100%;background:#fafaf8;z-index:99999;box-shadow:-4px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform 0.35s ease;display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2dbd0;">
      <h2 id="cartTitle" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:0.04em;">购物袋</h2>
      <button id="closeCartBtn" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:1.3rem;color:#9e978d;padding:4px 8px;">&#10005;</button>
    </div>
    <div id="cartItems" style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;"></div>
    <div style="padding:16px 20px;border-top:1px solid #e2dbd0;">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <span id="cartTotalLabel" style="font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9e978d;">总计</span>
        <span id="cartTotal" style="font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:500;">RM 0</span>
      </div>
      <button id="checkoutBtn" style="width:100%;padding:15px;background:#0e0e0e;color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;">WhatsApp 结账</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- WISHLIST PANEL -->
  <div id="wishlistPanel" style="position:fixed;top:0;right:0;width:92%;max-width:380px;height:100%;background:#fafaf8;z-index:99999;box-shadow:-4px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform 0.35s ease;display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2dbd0;">
      <h2 id="wishlistTitle" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:0.04em;">收藏</h2>
      <button id="closeWishlistBtn" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:1.3rem;color:#9e978d;padding:4px 8px;">&#10005;</button>
    </div>
    <div id="wishlistItems" style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- BACKDROP -->
  <div id="panelBackdrop" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.45);z-index:99998;"></div>
<style id="luanz-ui">
  /* ── Size & Colour buttons ── */
  #product-page .size-btn { transition: background .18s, color .18s, border-color .18s, transform .1s; cursor: pointer; }
  #product-page .size-btn:active { transform: scale(0.93); }
  #product-page .size-btn.active { background: #0e0e0e; color: #fafaf8; border-color: #0e0e0e; }
  #product-page .colour-btn { transition: box-shadow .18s, transform .1s; cursor: pointer; }
  #product-page .colour-btn:active { transform: scale(0.88); }
  #product-page .colour-btn.active { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2.5px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #0e0e0e; }
  #product-page .color-thumb { cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .18s; }
  #product-page .color-thumb.active { border-color: #0e0e0e !important; }
  /* ── CTA buttons ── */
  #product-page .btn-add-bag { transition: background .2s, transform .1s; }
  #product-page .btn-add-bag:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
  #product-page .btn-add-bag.luanz-adding { background: #2a6e2a !important; }
  #product-page .btn-wishlist { transition: border-color .2s, color .2s, transform .1s; }
  #product-page .btn-wishlist:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
  #product-page .btn-wishlist.luanz-saved { border-color: #c8a97e !important; color: #c8a97e !important; }
  /* ── Badge ── */
  [data-badge] { transition: transform .15s; }
  [data-badge].pop { animation: luanz-pop .3s ease; }
  @keyframes luanz-pop { 0%{transform:scale(0)} 60%{transform:scale(1.35)} 100%{transform:scale(1)} }
  /* ── Toast ── */
  #luanz-toast {
    position: fixed; bottom: 96px; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(14px);
    background: #1a1a1a; color: #fafaf8;
    font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .12em;
    padding: 11px 22px; border-radius: 3px;
    opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity .25s, transform .25s;
    z-index: 9999999; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  #luanz-toast.show { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
  /* ── Shake ── */
  @keyframes luanz-shake { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)} 20%,60%{transform:translateX(-5px)} 40%,80%{transform:translateX(6px)} }
</style>
<script id="luanz-system">
/**
 * NEATZ Global Commerce System
 * 
 * Architecture:
 *   window.NEATZ  — single namespace, all logic here
 *   localStorage  — single source of truth for cart + wishlist
 *   data-badge    — selector for ALL badge spans (any nav, any page)
 *   data-action   — selector for ALL trigger buttons (any nav, any page)
 * 
 * Data flow:
 *   User action → NEATZ.cart.add() / NEATZ.wish.add()
 *     → writes localStorage
 *     → NEATZ.ui.sync()          (updates ALL badges everywhere)
 *     → NEATZ.ui.panel.open()    (opens the correct slide panel)
 */

(function(w){
  'use strict';

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     STORAGE LAYER — isolated read/write
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  var STORE = {
    getCart:  function(){ try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('neatz-cart')||'[]'); }catch(e){ return []; } },
    getWish:  function(){ try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('neatz-wishlist')||'[]'); }catch(e){ return []; } },
    setCart:  function(v){ localStorage.setItem('neatz-cart', JSON.stringify(v)); },
    setWish:  function(v){ localStorage.setItem('neatz-wishlist', JSON.stringify(v)); }
  };

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     UI LAYER — DOM updates only
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  var UI = {

    /* Sync ALL badge spans on the page regardless of which nav is visible */
    sync: function(){
      var cart = STORE.getCart();
      var wish = STORE.getWish();
      var cartTotal = cart.reduce(function(s,c){ return s+(c.qty||1); }, 0);

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-badge="cart"]').forEach(function(el){
        if(cartTotal > 0){ el.textContent = cartTotal > 9 ? '9+' : cartTotal; el.style.display = 'block'; }
        else { el.style.display = 'none'; }
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-badge="wish"]').forEach(function(el){
        if(wish.length > 0){ el.textContent = wish.length > 9 ? '9+' : wish.length; el.style.display = 'block'; }
        else { el.style.display = 'none'; }
      });
    },

    /* Pop animation on ALL badges of a type */
    pop: function(type){
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-badge="'+type+'"]').forEach(function(el){
        el.classList.remove('pop');
        void el.offsetWidth;
        el.classList.add('pop');
      });
    },

    /* Toast */
    toast: function(msg){
      var t = document.getElementById('luanz-toast');
      if(!t){ t = document.createElement('div'); t.id = 'luanz-toast'; document.body.appendChild(t); }
      t.textContent = msg; t.classList.add('show');
      clearTimeout(t._t); t._t = setTimeout(function(){ t.classList.remove('show'); }, 2400);
    },

    /* Panels */
    panel: {
      open: function(id){
        var p = document.getElementById(id);
        var bd = document.getElementById('panelBackdrop');
        if(p)  p.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
        if(bd) bd.style.display  = 'block';
      },
      close: function(id){
        var p = document.getElementById(id);
        if(p) p.style.transform = 'translateX(100%)';
      },
      closeAll: function(){
        UI.panel.close('cartPanel'); UI.panel.close('wishlistPanel');
        var bd = document.getElementById('panelBackdrop');
        if(bd) bd.style.display = 'none';
      }
    },

    /* Language helper */
    isZh: function(){ var b = document.getElementById('langZH'); return b && b.classList.contains('active'); },

    /* Render cart panel */
    renderCart: function(){
      var zh = UI.isZh();
      var cart = STORE.getCart();
      var el = document.getElementById('cartItems'); if(!el) return;
      var te  = document.getElementById('cartTitle');
      var tot = document.getElementById('cartTotal');
      var cb  = document.getElementById('checkoutBtn');
      if(te) te.textContent = zh ? '购物袋' : 'Shopping Bag';
      if(cb) cb.textContent = zh ? 'WhatsApp 结账' : 'Checkout via WhatsApp';

      if(!cart.length){
        el.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center;padding:52px 0;color:#9e978d;font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.08em;">'+(zh?'购物袋是空的':'Your bag is empty')+'</p>';
        if(tot) tot.textContent = 'RM 0';
        UI.sync(); return;
      }
      var total = 0, rows = '';
      cart.forEach(function(item, i){
        var price = parseFloat((item.price||'85').replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));
        total += price * (item.qty||1);
        rows += '<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #e2dbd0;">';
        rows += '<div style="width:70px;height:86px;background:#f0ebe3;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;border-radius:2px;">';
        if(item.img) rows += '<img src="'+item.img+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">';
        rows += '</div><div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">';
        rows += '<p style="font-family:\'Cormorant Garamond\',serif;font-size:.95rem;margin:0 0 3px;">'+item.name+'</p>';
        rows += '<p style="font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#9e978d;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 4px;">'+item.color+' / '+item.size+'</p>';
        rows += '<p style="font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;margin:0 0 10px;">'+item.price+'</p>';
        rows += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">';
        rows += '<button onclick="NEATZ.cart.qty('+i+',-1)" style="width:26px;height:26px;border:1px solid #e2dbd0;background:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;">-</button>';
        rows += '<span style="font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;min-width:20px;text-align:center;">'+(item.qty||1)+'</span>';
        rows += '<button onclick="NEATZ.cart.qty('+i+',1)" style="width:26px;height:26px;border:1px solid #e2dbd0;background:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;">+</button>';
        rows += '<button onclick="NEATZ.cart.remove('+i+')" style="margin-left:auto;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#9e978d;font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">'+(zh?'删除':'Remove')+'</button>';
        rows += '</div></div></div>';
      });
      el.innerHTML = rows;
      if(tot) tot.textContent = 'RM ' + total.toFixed(2);
      UI.sync();
    },

    /* Render wishlist panel */
    renderWish: function(){
      var zh = UI.isZh();
      var wish = STORE.getWish();
      var el = document.getElementById('wishlistItems'); if(!el) return;
      var te = document.getElementById('wishlistTitle');
      if(te) te.textContent = zh ? '收藏' : 'Wishlist';

      if(!wish.length){
        el.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center;padding:52px 0;color:#9e978d;font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.08em;">'+(zh?'还没有收藏任何商品':'No saved items yet')+'</p>';
        UI.sync(); return;
      }
      var rows = '';
      wish.forEach(function(item, i){
        rows += '<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #e2dbd0;">';
        rows += '<div style="width:70px;height:86px;background:#f0ebe3;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;border-radius:2px;">';
        if(item.img) rows += '<img src="'+item.img+'" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">';
        rows += '</div><div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">';
        rows += '<p style="font-family:\'Cormorant Garamond\',serif;font-size:.95rem;margin:0 0 3px;">'+item.name+'</p>';
        rows += '<p style="font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#9e978d;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 6px;">'+item.color+'</p>';
        rows += '<p style="font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;margin:0 0 10px;">'+(item.price||'RM99.90')+'</p>';
        rows += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">';
        rows += '<button onclick="NEATZ.wish.moveToCart('+i+')" style="padding:7px 14px;background:#0e0e0e;color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">'+(zh?'加入购物袋':'Add to Bag')+'</button>';
        rows += '<button onclick="NEATZ.wish.remove('+i+')" style="padding:7px 14px;background:none;border:1px solid #e2dbd0;cursor:pointer;font-family:Jost,sans-serif;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9e978d;">'+(zh?'删除':'Remove')+'</button>';
        rows += '</div></div></div>';
      });
      el.innerHTML = rows;
      UI.sync();
    }
  };

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     CART ACTIONS
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  var CART = {
    add: function(item){
      var cart = STORE.getCart();
      var idx = -1;
      for(var i=0; i<cart.length; i++){
        if(cart[i].color===item.color && cart[i].size===item.size && cart[i].name===item.name){ idx=i; break; }
      }
      if(idx >= 0) cart[idx].qty = (cart[idx].qty||1) + 1;
      else { item.qty = 1; cart.push(item); }
      STORE.setCart(cart);
      UI.sync();
      UI.pop('cart');
    },
    qty: function(i, delta){
      var cart = STORE.getCart();
      if(!cart[i]) return;
      cart[i].qty = Math.max(1, (cart[i].qty||1) + delta);
      STORE.setCart(cart);
      UI.renderCart();
    },
    remove: function(i){
      var cart = STORE.getCart();
      cart.splice(i, 1);
      STORE.setCart(cart);
      UI.renderCart();
    }
  };

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     WISHLIST ACTIONS
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  var WISH = {
    add: function(item){
      var wish = STORE.getWish();
      var exists = wish.some(function(w){ return w.color===item.color && w.name===item.name; });
      if(!exists){ wish.push(item); STORE.setWish(wish); }
      UI.sync();
      UI.pop('wish');
    },
    remove: function(i){
      var wish = STORE.getWish();
      wish.splice(i, 1);
      STORE.setWish(wish);
      UI.renderWish();
    },
    moveToCart: function(i){
      var wish = STORE.getWish();
      var cart = STORE.getCart();
      var item = wish[i]; if(!item) return;
      var idx = -1;
      for(var j=0; j<cart.length; j++){
        if(cart[j].color===item.color && cart[j].name===item.name){ idx=j; break; }
      }
      if(idx >= 0) cart[idx].qty = (cart[idx].qty||1) + 1;
      else { item.qty = 1; cart.push(item); }
      wish.splice(i, 1);
      STORE.setCart(cart); STORE.setWish(wish);
      UI.panel.close('wishlistPanel');
      setTimeout(function(){ UI.renderCart(); UI.panel.open('cartPanel'); }, 350);
    }
  };

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     PRODUCT PAGE — local state only
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  var PRODUCT = {
    selSize:  null,
    selColor: 'Black',

    initSize: function(){
      var btns = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .size-btn');
      btns.forEach(function(btn){
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
          btns.forEach(function(b){ b.classList.remove('active'); });
          btn.classList.add('active');
          PRODUCT.selSize = btn.textContent.trim();
          var el = document.getElementById('p_selectedSize');
          if(el) el.textContent = PRODUCT.selSize;
        });
      });
    },

    initColour: function(){
      var dots   = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .colour-btn');
      var thumbs = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .color-thumb');

      function pick(name, dot, thumb){
        dots.forEach(function(d){ d.classList.remove('active'); });
        thumbs.forEach(function(t){ t.classList.remove('active'); });
        if(dot)   dot.classList.add('active');
        if(thumb) thumb.classList.add('active');
        PRODUCT.selColor = name;
        var el = document.getElementById('p_selectedColor');
        if(el) el.textContent = name;
        // Swap gallery images
        var mi = document.getElementById('p_mainImg');
        if(mi){ var s = name==='White' ? mi.dataset.white : mi.dataset.black; if(s) mi.src=s; }
        ['p_slide2','p_slide3','p_slide4'].forEach(function(id){
          var sl = document.getElementById(id); if(!sl) return;
          var img = sl.querySelector('img'); if(!img) return;
          var s = name==='White' ? img.dataset.white : img.dataset.black; if(s) img.src=s;
        });
        var gs = document.getElementById('p_gallerySlides');
        if(gs) gs.scrollTo({ left:0, behavior:'smooth' });
      }

      dots.forEach(function(d, i){
        d.addEventListener('click', function(){
          pick(d.classList.contains('black') ? 'Black' : 'White', d, thumbs[i]);
        });
      });
      thumbs.forEach(function(th, i){
        th.addEventListener('click', function(){
          var l = th.querySelector('.color-thumb-label');
          var name = l && l.textContent.trim().toLowerCase()==='white' ? 'White' : 'Black';
          pick(name, dots[i], th);
        });
      });
    },

    initAddBag: function(){
      var btn = document.getElementById('p_addBagBtn');
      if(!btn) return;
      btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var zh = UI.isZh();
        if(!PRODUCT.selSize){
          UI.toast(zh ? '请先选择尺码 👆' : 'Please select a size first 👆');
          var so = document.querySelector('#product-page .size-options');
          if(so){ so.style.animation='none'; void so.offsetWidth; so.style.animation='luanz-shake .4s ease'; }
          return;
        }
        var mi = document.getElementById('p_mainImg');
        CART.add({ name:'AirFit\u2122 Oversized Tee', price:'RM99.90', color:PRODUCT.selColor, size:PRODUCT.selSize, img:mi?mi.src:'' });
        // Button feedback
        var orig = btn.textContent;
        btn.classList.add('luanz-adding'); btn.textContent = zh ? '\u2713 \u5df2\u52a0\u5165' : '✓ Added!'; btn.disabled = true;
        setTimeout(function(){
          btn.textContent = orig; btn.classList.remove('luanz-adding'); btn.disabled = false;
          UI.renderCart(); UI.panel.open('cartPanel');
        }, 1100);
      });
    },

    initWishlist: function(){
      var btn = document.getElementById('p_wishlistBtn');
      if(!btn) return;
      btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var zh = UI.isZh();
        var mi = document.getElementById('p_mainImg');
        WISH.add({ name:'AirFit\u2122 Oversized Tee', price:'RM99.90', color:PRODUCT.selColor, size:PRODUCT.selSize||'', img:mi?mi.src:'' });
        var span = btn.querySelector('span') || btn;
        var orig = span.textContent;
        btn.classList.add('luanz-saved'); span.textContent = zh ? '\u2665 \u5df2\u6536\u85cf' : '♥ Saved!';
        setTimeout(function(){
          btn.classList.remove('luanz-saved'); span.textContent = orig;
          UI.renderWish(); UI.panel.open('wishlistPanel');
        }, 900);
      });
    },

    init: function(){
      PRODUCT.initSize();
      PRODUCT.initColour();
      PRODUCT.initAddBag();
      PRODUCT.initWishlist();
    }
  };

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     GLOBAL NAV WIRING
     Uses data-action — works on ANY nav in the DOM
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  function initGlobalNav(){
    // Wire every open-cart button in the DOM
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-action="open-cart"]').forEach(function(btn){
      btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ UI.renderCart(); UI.panel.open('cartPanel'); });
    });
    // Wire every open-wish button in the DOM
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-action="open-wish"]').forEach(function(btn){
      btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ UI.renderWish(); UI.panel.open('wishlistPanel'); });
    });

    var closeCartBtn  = document.getElementById('closeCartBtn');
    var closeWishBtn  = document.getElementById('closeWishlistBtn');
    var backdrop      = document.getElementById('panelBackdrop');
    var checkoutBtn   = document.getElementById('checkoutBtn');

    if(closeCartBtn)  closeCartBtn.addEventListener('click',  function(){ UI.panel.close('cartPanel');    var bd=document.getElementById('panelBackdrop'); if(bd) bd.style.display='none'; });
    if(closeWishBtn)  closeWishBtn.addEventListener('click',  function(){ UI.panel.close('wishlistPanel'); var bd=document.getElementById('panelBackdrop'); if(bd) bd.style.display='none'; });
    if(backdrop)      backdrop.addEventListener('click', UI.panel.closeAll);

    if(checkoutBtn) checkoutBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
      var zh = UI.isZh(); var cart = STORE.getCart();
      if(!cart.length){ alert(zh ? '购物袋是空的！' : 'Your bag is empty!'); return; }
      var lines='', total=0;
      cart.forEach(function(c){
        var p = parseFloat((c.price||'85').replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));
        total += p * (c.qty||1);
        lines += encodeURIComponent(c.name+' | '+c.color+' | '+c.size+' x'+(c.qty||1)+' | '+c.price)+'%0A';
      });
      var msg = zh
        ? encodeURIComponent('\u60a8\u597d NEATZ\uff01\u6211\u60f3\u8ba2\u8d2d\uff1a')+'%0A%0A'+lines+'%0A'+encodeURIComponent('\u603b\u8ba1\uff1aRM '+total.toFixed(2)+'\n\n\u8bf7\u786e\u8ba4\u5e93\u5b58\uff0c\u8c22\u8c22\uff01')
        : 'Hi%20NEATZ!%20I%20want%20to%20order:%0A%0A'+lines+'%0ATotal:%20RM%20'+total.toFixed(2)+'%0A%0AThank%20you!';
      window.open('https://wa.me/60123456789?text='+msg, '_blank');
    });
  }

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     BOOT — runs once on window.load
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){
    initGlobalNav();
    PRODUCT.init();
    UI.sync();  // Restore badges from localStorage on page load
  });

  /* ─────────────────────────────────────────
     PUBLIC API — exposed on window.NEATZ
  ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  w.NEATZ = { cart: CART, wish: WISH, ui: UI, store: STORE };

  /* ── Global colour shims (called by inline onclick on colour buttons) ── */
  w.p_selectColor = function(btn, name) {
    var dots   = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .colour-btn');
    var thumbs = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .color-thumb');
    dots.forEach(function(d){ d.classList.remove('active'); });
    thumbs.forEach(function(t){ t.classList.remove('active'); });
    btn.classList.add('active');
    // Sync matching thumb
    thumbs.forEach(function(th){
      var lbl = th.querySelector('.color-thumb-label');
      if(lbl && lbl.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase().replace('jet ','')) {
        th.classList.add('active');
      }
      // Also match on alt text of img
      var img = th.querySelector('img');
      if(img && img.alt.toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase()) th.classList.add('active');
    });
    PRODUCT.selColor = name;
    var el = document.getElementById('p_selectedColor');
    if(el) el.textContent = name;
    // Swap gallery images
    var isWhite = name.toLowerCase() === 'white';
    var mi = document.getElementById('p_mainImg');
    if(mi){ var s = isWhite ? mi.dataset.white : mi.dataset.black; if(s) mi.src = s; }
    ['p_slide2','p_slide3','p_slide4'].forEach(function(id){
      var sl = document.getElementById(id); if(!sl) return;
      var img = sl.querySelector('img'); if(!img) return;
      var s = isWhite ? img.dataset.white : img.dataset.black; if(s) img.src = s;
    });
    var gs = document.getElementById('p_gallerySlides');
    if(gs) gs.scrollTo({ left:0, behavior:'smooth' });
  };

  w.p_selectColorThumb = function(thumb, colorKey) {
    // colorKey is 'Black' or 'White' — map to full name
    var name = colorKey === 'White' ? 'White' : 'Black';
    var dots   = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .colour-btn');
    var thumbs = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .color-thumb');
    dots.forEach(function(d){ d.classList.remove('active'); });
    thumbs.forEach(function(t){ t.classList.remove('active'); });
    thumb.classList.add('active');
    // Activate matching colour dot
    dots.forEach(function(d){
      if(colorKey === 'White' && d.classList.contains('white')) d.classList.add('active');
      if(colorKey === 'Black' && d.classList.contains('black')) d.classList.add('active');
    });
    PRODUCT.selColor = name;
    var el = document.getElementById('p_selectedColor');
    if(el) el.textContent = name;
    var isWhite = colorKey === 'White';
    var mi = document.getElementById('p_mainImg');
    if(mi){ var s = isWhite ? mi.dataset.white : mi.dataset.black; if(s) mi.src = s; }
    ['p_slide2','p_slide3','p_slide4'].forEach(function(id){
      var sl = document.getElementById(id); if(!sl) return;
      var img = sl.querySelector('img'); if(!img) return;
      var s = isWhite ? img.dataset.white : img.dataset.black; if(s) img.src = s;
    });
    var gs = document.getElementById('p_gallerySlides');
    if(gs) gs.scrollTo({ left:0, behavior:'smooth' });
  };

  /* ── Accordion shim ── */
  w.p_toggleAccordion = function(btn) {
    var item = btn ? btn.parentElement : null;
    if (!item) return;
    var isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
    // Close all
    document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .accordion-item').forEach(function(i) {
      i.classList.remove('open');
    });
    if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
  };

  /* ── Size guide shims (alias to size chart) ── */
  w.p_openSizeGuide = function() {
    if (w.p_openSizeChart) w.p_openSizeChart();
  };
  w.p_closeSizeGuide = function() {
    if (w.p_closeSizeChart) w.p_closeSizeChart();
  };

}(window));
</script>

<script id="neatz-ux">

(function () {
  'use strict';

  /* ── 1. Navbar scroll state ── */
  var nav = document.getElementById('navbar');
  if (nav) {
    var lastY = 0;
    window.addEventListener('scroll', function () {
      var y = window.scrollY;
      if (y > 24) nav.classList.add('scrolled');
      else nav.classList.remove('scrolled');
      lastY = y;
    }, { passive: true });
  }

  /* ── 2. Intersection observer for .reveal ── */
  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
      entries.forEach(function (entry) {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add('in-view');
          io.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

    function observeReveal() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function (el) {
        io.observe(el);
      });
    }
    observeReveal();

    /* Re-observe after product page opens */
    var origOpen = window.openProductPage;
    if (origOpen) {
      window.openProductPage = function () {
        origOpen();
        setTimeout(observeReveal, 60);
      };
    }
  } else {
    /* Fallback: show all immediately */
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function (el) {
      el.classList.add('in-view');
    });
  }

  

  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    // nothing needed here — all wiring done in neatz-collection
  });

  /* ── 4. Smooth hover — scale on product images ── */
  document.querySelectorAll('.category-card img, .featured-inner img').forEach(function (img) {
    img.style.transition = 'transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)';
    img.parentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    img.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () { img.style.transform = 'scale(1.03)'; });
    img.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () { img.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; });
  });

})();
</script>

<style id="neatz-quickadd">
/* ── Quick Add Modal ── */
#quick-add-modal.show {
  opacity: 1;
  pointer-events: all;
}
.qa-backdrop {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(8,8,8,0.4);
  cursor: pointer;
}
.qa-panel {
  position: relative;
  background: var(--white, #f7f6f3);
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 480px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
  padding: 24px 20px 40px;
  transform: translateY(40px);
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
  z-index: 1;
}
#quick-add-modal.show .qa-panel { transform: translateY(0); }

.qa-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  position: relative;
}
.qa-title {
  font-family: 'Bebas Neue', var(--font-display, sans-serif);
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--black, #080808);
  font-weight: 400;
}
.qa-subtitle {
  font-family: var(--font-sans, 'DM Sans', sans-serif);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--warm-grey, #9a9088);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}
.qa-close {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; right: 0;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  color: var(--warm-grey, #9a9088);
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0;
}
.qa-sizes {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.qa-size-btn {
  min-width: 52px;
  height: 44px;
  background: none;
  border: 1px solid var(--beige-mid, #dedad2);
  border-radius: 2px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: var(--font-sans, 'DM Sans', sans-serif);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--dark-grey, #2a2825);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s, color 0.18s;
}
.qa-size-btn:hover {
  background: var(--black, #080808);
  border-color: var(--black, #080808);
  color: var(--white, #f7f6f3);
}
.qa-note {
  font-family: var(--font-sans, 'DM Sans', sans-serif);
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  color: var(--warm-grey, #9a9088);
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-align: center;
}
</style>

<script id="neatz-collection">

(function () {
  'use strict';

  /* ── Open / Close Collection Page ── */
  window.openCollectionPage = function () {
    var page = document.getElementById('collection-page');
    if (!page) return;
    page.classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    page.scrollTop = 0;

    // Sync badges in collection nav
    if (window.NEATZ && window.NEATZ.ui) window.NEATZ.ui.sync();
    // Wire nav panel buttons inside collection page
    page.querySelectorAll('[data-action="open-cart"]').forEach(function (btn) {
      btn.onclick = function () {
        if (window.NEATZ && window.NEATZ.ui && window.NEATZ.ui.renderCart) window.NEATZ.ui.renderCart();
        var p = document.getElementById('cartPanel');
        var bd = document.getElementById('panelBackdrop');
        if (p) p.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
        if (bd) bd.style.display = 'block';
      };
    });
    page.querySelectorAll('[data-action="open-wish"]').forEach(function (btn) {
      btn.onclick = function () {
        if (window.NEATZ && window.NEATZ.ui && window.NEATZ.ui.renderWish) window.NEATZ.ui.renderWish();
        var p = document.getElementById('wishlistPanel');
        var bd = document.getElementById('panelBackdrop');
        if (p) p.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
        if (bd) bd.style.display = 'block';
      };
    });
  };

  window.closeCollectionPage = function () {
    var page = document.getElementById('collection-page');
    if (!page) return;
    page.classList.remove('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };

  /* ── Filter cards by colour ── */
  window.filterCollection = function (btn, filter) {
    // Update active button state
    document.querySelectorAll('.coll-filter-btn').forEach(function (b) {
      b.classList.remove('active');
    });
    btn.classList.add('active');

    // Show/hide cards
    document.querySelectorAll('.coll-card').forEach(function (card) {
      if (filter === 'all') {
        card.classList.remove('hidden');
      } else {
        var color = card.dataset.color || '';
        if (color === filter) card.classList.remove('hidden');
        else card.classList.add('hidden');
      }
    });

    // Update count
    var visible = document.querySelectorAll('.coll-card:not(.hidden)').length;
    var countEl = document.querySelector('.collection-count');
    if (countEl) countEl.textContent = visible + ' style' + (visible !== 1 ? 's' : '');
  };

  /* ── Open product detail from collection ── */
  window.openProductFromCollection = function (colorVariant) {
    // Pre-select the colour on the product page
    setTimeout(function () {
      var colourBtns = document.querySelectorAll('#product-page .colour-btn');
      colourBtns.forEach(function (btn) {
        var isBlack = btn.classList.contains('black');
        var isWhite = btn.classList.contains('white');
        var shouldActive = (colorVariant === 'black' && isBlack) ||
                           (colorVariant === 'white' && isWhite);
        btn.classList.toggle('active', shouldActive);
      });
      // Fire colour pick if NEATZ product system exists
      var targetBtn = document.querySelector(
        '#product-page .colour-btn.' + (colorVariant === 'white' ? 'white' : 'black')
      );
      if (targetBtn && targetBtn.click) targetBtn.click();
    }, 60);

    // Close collection, open product
    closeCollectionPage();
    if (window.openProductPage) window.openProductPage();
  };

  /* ── Quick Add to Cart (size prompt) ── */
  window.quickAddToCart = function (colorName) {
    // Show a compact size selector overlay
    var existing = document.getElementById('quick-add-modal');
    if (existing) existing.remove();

    var modal = document.createElement('div');
    modal.id = 'quick-add-modal';
    modal.innerHTML = [
      '<div class="qa-backdrop" onclick="document.getElementById(\'quick-add-modal\').remove()"></div>',
      '<div class="qa-panel">',
        '<div class="qa-header">',
          '<p class="qa-title">Select Size</p>',
          '<p class="qa-subtitle">AirFit™ Oversized Tee — ' + colorName + '</p>',
          '<button class="qa-close" onclick="document.getElementById(\'quick-add-modal\').remove()">&times;</button>',
        '</div>',
        '<div class="qa-sizes">',
          ['00','0','1','2','3','4'].map(function(sz) {
            return '<button class="qa-size-btn" onclick="quickAddConfirm(\'' + colorName + '\',\'' + sz + '\')">' + sz + '</button>';
          }).join(''),
        '</div>',
        '<p class="qa-note">Tap a size to add to bag</p>',
      '</div>'
    ].join('');
    document.body.appendChild(modal);

    // Animate in
    setTimeout(function () { modal.classList.add('show'); }, 10);
  };

  window.quickAddConfirm = function (color, size) {
    var mi = document.getElementById('p_mainImg');
    var img = mi ? mi.src : '';
    // If white, use white image
    if (color === 'White' && mi && mi.dataset.white) img = mi.dataset.white;
    if (color === 'Black' && mi && mi.dataset.black) img = mi.dataset.black;

    if (window.NEATZ && window.NEATZ.cart) {
      window.NEATZ.cart.add({
        name: 'AirFit\u2122 Oversized Tee',
        price: 'RM99.90',
        color: color,
        size: size,
        img: img
      });
    }
    // Remove modal with confirmation
    var modal = document.getElementById('quick-add-modal');
    if (modal) {
      var panel = modal.querySelector('.qa-panel');
      if (panel) {
        panel.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:32px 24px;text-align:center;">' +
          '<p style="font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:8px;">✓</p>' +
          '<p style="font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--black);">Added to Bag</p>' +
          '<p style="font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--warm-grey);margin-top:4px;">' + color + ' / Size ' + size + '</p>' +
          '</div>';
      }
      setTimeout(function () { if (modal.parentNode) modal.remove(); }, 1400);
    }
  };

  /* ── Wire the "Shirts" category card to open collection ── */
  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    var catCard = document.querySelector('#categories .category-card');
    if (catCard) {
      catCard.onclick = function () { window.openCollectionPage(); };
    }
    // Also update badge counts in collection nav on storage changes
    window.addEventListener('storage', function () {
      if (window.NEATZ && window.NEATZ.ui) window.NEATZ.ui.sync();
    });
  });

})();


</script>
</body>
</html>
